_doc: Contract scoring. Weights are normalized by their sum; each component scores 0..1; total = 100 * weighted average. All bands and filters live here - no magic numbers in code.

delta_band._doc: Target |delta| range. 1.0 inside, linear falloff to 0 over `falloff` outside.

dte_band._doc: Default target days-to-expiry range, falloff in days. Also widens the chain fetch window. The UI DTE filter overrides this per scan using dte_presets below.

dte_presets._doc: Selectable expiry targets for the scan's DTE filter. Each overrides dte_band (chain fetch window + dte_fit scoring) AND, when present, the scoring `weights` for that scan - so picking a DTE auto-retunes the weighted score to that horizon. 'default' (no selection) uses the top-level weights + dte_band above.

extrinsic._doc: Extrinsic premium as fraction of mid. <= best_max_pct scores 1.0, >= worst_pct scores 0.0.

spread._doc: (ask - bid) / mid. <= best_max_pct scores 1.0, >= worst_pct scores 0.0.

iv_rank._doc: Percentile of today's ATM IV vs the trailing 90 days stored in iv_history. Neutral 0.5 until min_history_days of history exists.

trend_alignment._doc: Blend of the underlying's own EMA trend score and the market regime score.

filters._doc: Optional hard filters - null/blank means NO filter (nothing ruled out); the scoring weights still rank these traits. A tradeable quote (positive bid/ask/mid) and greeks are always required so a contract can be priced and scored. price_min/price_max filter by the UNDERLYING share price.

chain_window._doc: Strike window fetched per underlying relative to spot; expiry window is the dte band padded by falloff_days.
